title: Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple
tagline: Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sivanandeswarar Temple (திருப்பந்துறை சிவானந்தேசுவரர் கோயில் ])is a Hindu temple located at Tirupandurai in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Sivanandeswarar Temple (திருப்பந்துறை சிவானந்தேசுவரர் கோயில் ])is a Hindu temple located at Tirupandurai in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Sivanandeswarar. His consort is known as Mangalambikai.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Natchiarkoil
topPlaces.description: Natchiarkoil is a neighbourhood in Kumbakonam of Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Nachiarkoil lamps, which are made of brass, are produced locally.

topPlaces.name: Thirunarayur Nambi Temple
topPlaces.description: Nachiyar Kovil or Thirunarayur Nambi Temple is a Sri Vaishnava Hindu temple in Thirunarayur, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to Niladevi, an aspect of the goddess Lakshmi, and her consort Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Thukkachi Abatsahayesvar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thukkachi Abatsahayesvar temple (also known as Sri Abathsahayeswarar Sowndaranayaki Ambal temple) is a Shiva temple in Thukkachi village near Kumbakonam in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mathur, Kumbakonam
topPlaces.description: Mathur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk, Thiruvidaimarudur block of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Enanallur
topPlaces.description: Enanallur is a village in Kumbakonam taluk, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple (ஆண்டார்கோயில் சொர்ணபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in the village of Andankoil in Valangaiman taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Padikasu Nathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Padikasu Nathar Temple (also called Swarnapureeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located at Azhagaputhur, a village in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Padikasunathar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Villiyavarambal
topPlaces.description: Villiyavarambal is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Natchiarkoil is a neighbourhood in Kumbakonam of Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Nachiarkoil lamps, which are made of brass, are produced locally.

Nachiyar Kovil or Thirunarayur Nambi Temple is a Sri Vaishnava Hindu temple in Thirunarayur, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to Niladevi, an aspect of the goddess Lakshmi, and her consort Vishnu.
Thukkachi Abatsahayesvar temple (also known as Sri Abathsahayeswarar Sowndaranayaki Ambal temple) is a Shiva temple in Thukkachi village near Kumbakonam in Tamil Nadu, India.
Mathur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk, Thiruvidaimarudur block of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Enanallur is a village in Kumbakonam taluk, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.
Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple (ஆண்டார்கோயில் சொர்ணபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in the village of Andankoil in Valangaiman taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

Padikasu Nathar Temple (also called Swarnapureeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located at Azhagaputhur, a village in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Padikasunathar, and is represented by the lingam.
Villiyavarambal is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirupandurai Sivanandeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Natchiarkoil, Thirunarayur Nambi Temple, Thukkachi Abatsahayesvar Temple, Mathur, Kumbakonam, Enanallur.
